trace_table.claim: Membership page metadata and social metadata use the membership title and free-membership description.

trace_table.claim: Membership is free. The only currency is showing up.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, Membership page heading

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME membership costs nothing, handles no money, charges no fees, and gives members a way into the industry and a community that wants them to rise.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, Membership intro

trace_table.claim: Community proof points show 1,300+ members across the Middle East and beyond, 40+ countries where members live and work, and free membership.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, Home proof points and Membership intro; 01.02 Individual Membership - Decision & Handoff.md, member data

trace_table.claim: Membership is open to women at any stage of the aviation journey, with cards for students/cadets/schoolgirls, women breaking in or returning, women already working, and leaders.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, Membership Who it's for

trace_table.claim: Members get an always-current opportunities board, events with follow-through, a mentor, a member-only directory, and a profile and certificates they can share.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, Membership What you get

trace_table.claim: Recognition runs from Member to Active Member to Ambassador, with a small Leadership Circle at the top, and is earned by contribution rather than money.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, Membership How recognition works; 01.02 Recognition Thresholds (Decision).md

trace_table.claim: Recognition ladder labels carry on-screen explanations for Member, Active Member, Ambassador, and Leadership Circle.

trace_table.claim: Joining takes a minute through three steps: tell WAI-ME where you are in aviation, enter the opportunities board and next event, then complete your profile.

trace_table.claim: There is no approval queue and no fee. You are in as soon as you join.

summary: All material claims on the built /membership page trace to the vault, and the recognition labels now carry vault-sourced plain-language explanations. The brand locks hold and there are no staging allowances for this page.
